creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
I see on https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkg-fallout/ that the mailing list freebsd-pkg-fallout is very busy, with 10k-20k emails per month.


However, in the mail archive we stopped around Nov 2021 with storing emails.


find -s ???? -name '*[0-9].freebsd-pkg-fallout.gz' -size +100c| tail -n3
2021/freebsd-pkg-fallout/20211031.freebsd-pkg-fallout.gz
2021/freebsd-pkg-fallout/20211107.freebsd-pkg-fallout.gz
2021/freebsd-pkg-fallout/20211114.freebsd-pkg-fallout.gz

After that time, all archives are empty. Any idea whats wrong here?
